subject: Databases
title: Performance Testing
description: A short lesson to help you apply Performance Testing.

hook.text: The query runs in 2 ms on dev with 100 rows. In production with 50 million rows? 15 seconds.

buildup.text: Test with production-sized data. Performance characteristics change dramatically with scale.

discovery.text: pgbench (Postgres) and sysbench (MySQL) generate realistic workloads for benchmarking.

twist.text: Test under concurrency. A fast query alone may deadlock or slow down when 100 users run it at once.

climax.text: Capture production query patterns and replay them against staging. The best test mirrors real usage.

punchline.text: Test with real data, real volume, real concurrency. Dev isn't production.

quiz.question: Why is testing with production-sized data important?
options: Query performance changes dramatically with scale due to index behavior and I/O patterns
Small datasets are not supported by testing tools
Production data is always more accurate than test data
